title: conyza steetzii
intro: Conyza steetzii, also known as Steetz's fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Conyza steetzii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Conyza steetzii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
